items.title: Google bought all of a major solar farm's output to offset its dirty data center emissions
items.summary: Google has struck a deal to purchase a major solar project's entire electrical output to offset its fossil fuel emissions.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Sotheby’s Big T. Rex Auction Raises Concerns Hype and Wealth Are Upending Science
items.summary: Private buyers are increasingly outbidding museums for fossils. That’s making it difficult—or even impossible—for researchers to improve our understanding of the past.
